nodes.title: How to use
widgets_values:
# Recommendation
Input image: Chuck into your image editing model of choice and replace the background with plain white. This (sometimes) helps the model keep the original background of the video in replace mode.


# Instructions

Set frame load cap in Load Video Node (if Cap > Video Length it will auto limit to full video)
(Optional) Skip first frames if needed

Describe video in Clip Text Encode (green box above).
The more accurate the description, the better the gen will match the original

Select SCAIL-2 Identity Tracker below and press the blue play button which appears above the node. This loads the input image and the first frame of the input video. Draw bounding boxes around each character in both images, then execute the workflow as usual.

IMPORTANT: The number of subjects is hard capped at six by the model, and soft capped to the number of subjects in the input image.
Asuka strides through the hallway, a determined expression on her face.
